creator: catone@cpan.org
text:
Approve, thank you for fixing it.

On Wed, Sep 29, 2010 at 15:10, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of textproc/pootle,

> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix

> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =C2=A0 =C2=A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/151065
